creator: ler@FreeBSD.org
text:
I get the following failure in poudriere testport:

====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
Error: Missing: libdata/ldconfig/sigil
===> Error: Plist issues found.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/textproc/sigil
=>> Error: check-plist failures detected
build of textproc/sigil | sigil-0.9.10 ended at Mon Aug  6 16:40:44 CDT 2018
build time: 00:02:51

Can you look at it, please?
